jokes.text: Been a long time. Like a week. No, it's been, like, three weeks.
jokes.setup: Wax technician says it's been a long time since last visit
jokes.punchline: Abbi's casual 'like a week' followed by correction to three weeks reveals poor self-awareness
jokes.explanation: Nice character moment showing Abbi's tendency to minimize things that make her look bad

jokes.text: I'm sorry. Okay, this may hurt. My body's learned. Oh... kay.
jokes.setup: Abbi claims her body has 'learned' to handle waxing pain
jokes.punchline: Immediate regret and the technician's confused 'Oh...kay' suggests otherwise
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy through dialogue, relatable waxing experience

jokes.text: What about an umbrella, but it's connected to your clothes, so you don't have to hold it? That'd be hot.
jokes.setup: Ilana pitches what sounds like an innovative umbrella idea
jokes.punchline: She's basically describing a raincoat, which already exists
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ilana character moment - confidently pitching something that already exists

jokes.text: Hey, Ab, never mind about that umbrella idea. I forgot there's raincoats, duh.
jokes.punchline: Ilana realizes she reinvented raincoats
jokes.explanation: Great payoff to earlier joke, shows Ilana's scattered thinking process

jokes.text: If I don't slide, my flaps will come back.
jokes.setup: Gym member upset about canceled class
jokes.punchline: Oversharing about body parts in exercise context
jokes.explanation: Shocking and specific body horror delivered casually

jokes.text: I recognize you. You clean the locker room.
jokes.setup: Abbi volunteers to teach the class
jokes.punchline: Immediate deflation as member identifies her lowly job
jokes.explanation: Classic deflation humor, Abbi's moment of confidence immediately crushed

jokes.text: Come on, pussies!
jokes.setup: Abbi trying to be an inspiring fitness instructor
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate language that reveals her inexperience
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Abbi overcompensating with aggressive language

jokes.text: Dude, what do you think is worse? Constipation or diarrhea?
jokes.punchline: Extremely inappropriate topic for office discussion
jokes.explanation: Classic Ilana inappropriate workplace behavior, shows her obliviousness

jokes.text: Then why did I spend hours stapling all these documents together? I even ran out halfway through to buy more staples.
jokes.setup: Boss asks Ilana to remove staples
jokes.punchline: She went to extreme effort to do something specifically not requested
jokes.explanation: Great escalation showing Ilana's misguided work ethic and poor listening

jokes.text: You took an hour-and-48-minute break. And we have a cabinet full of staples here.
jokes.punchline: Practical details that completely deflate her excuse
jokes.explanation: Perfect straight-man response with specific details that destroy Ilana's defense

jokes.text: Honestly, I do it to buy myself some time because I am so overworked. Today I got eight e-mails.
jokes.punchline: Eight emails is hardly overwork by any standard
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Ilana's complete lack of work perspective

jokes.text: What's my e-mail gonna be? 'Business at the white man dot biz'?
jokes.setup: Boss wants her to use company email
jokes.punchline: Absurd corporate email parody with racial commentary
jokes.explanation: Sharp satire of corporate culture with Ilana's signature political incorrectness

jokes.text: It's IlanaWexler@MindMyVagina.com
jokes.punchline: Completely inappropriate personal email address
jokes.explanation: Peak Ilana - completely oblivious to professional inappropriateness

jokes.text: To remind every client immediately of a vagina? And a mind, dude.
jokes.setup: Boss points out the obvious inappropriateness
jokes.punchline: Ilana focuses on the 'mind' part as if that makes it better
jokes.explanation: Great continuation showing Ilana completely missing the point

jokes.text: They found Bryce and Zandir. They're dead.
jokes.punchline: Casual delivery of shocking news
jokes.explanation: Perfect dark comedy timing - casual delivery of tragic news

jokes.text: I mean, you clearly have cancer. Don't be ashamed.
jokes.punchline: Completely wrong assumption about her shaved head
jokes.explanation: Awkward assumption that creates perfect cringe moment

jokes.text: Me and my bandmates, we shaved our heads to raise awareness for our band.
jokes.punchline: Raising awareness 'for' the band, not a cause
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion - they're raising awareness for themselves, not charity

jokes.text: Oh, when there's a pube situation, you call on old Abbi. When there's something that actually matters, you just go another way.
jokes.setup: Boss asking Abbi to clean pubes on her day off
jokes.punchline: Abbi's bitter realization about her role in the hierarchy
jokes.explanation: Great character moment showing Abbi's growing frustration with being undervalued

jokes.text: Well, then I'd like to transfer to corporate morale. Corporate morale is not a department! It doesn't exist!
jokes.punchline: She's making up a department that doesn't exist
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ilana logic - creating solutions that don't exist in reality

jokes.text: wearing a napkin as a shirt, violently high
jokes.setup: Scene transition showing time has passed
jokes.punchline: Abbi's completely disheveled state described matter-of-factly
jokes.explanation: 'Violently high' is a great description, napkin shirt adds to the visual

jokes.text: I'm like, yes, Mr. George Bush. Whatever you say, Mr. George Bush. Dick Cheney, go easy on me, dude.
jokes.punchline: Random political figures in imaginary conversation
jokes.explanation: Stoned rambling that's mildly amusing but not particularly sharp

jokes.text: Before I know it, I'm gonna wake up and be 23 and my life's gonna be behind me. You know that I'm 25, right?
jokes.setup: Abbi fears waking up at 23 with life behind her
jokes.punchline: She's already older than that age
jokes.explanation: Good reality check moment showing Abbi's skewed perspective

jokes.text: Abbi, you are ageless. That's a different thing.
jokes.setup: Ilana needs to respond to age comment
jokes.punchline: Nonsensical distinction that sounds profound but means nothing
jokes.explanation: Classic Ilana pseudo-wisdom that sounds meaningful but isn't

jokes.text: If anyone's gonna pretend like they have cancer, it's gonna be me.
jokes.punchline: Deciding to fake cancer as empowerment
jokes.explanation: Dark callback that shows Abbi learning the wrong lesson from gym experience

jokes.text: You know what? I look too nice. You look really nice, yeah. No, I look like vanilla.
jokes.punchline: 'Vanilla' as an insult for being too wholesome
jokes.explanation: Solid character moment about Abbi's self-perception and desire to change

jokes.text: That'll be $438.
jokes.setup: Abbi trying on what seems like a simple outfit
jokes.punchline: Shockingly expensive price for basic clothes
jokes.explanation: Classic NYC shopping reality check, sets up the return scam

jokes.text: It's 30 days. I will see you in 30 days, then. Bitch!
jokes.punchline: Immediately planning to return items, then inappropriate outburst
jokes.explanation: Great escalation showing Abbi's attempt at being edgy backfiring

jokes.text: We're the sexiest girls here. 'Cause we have, like, the fattest asses, you know?
jokes.punchline: Ilana's confident but crude assessment of their attractiveness
jokes.explanation: Perfectly Ilana - confident sexuality delivered in crudest terms possible

jokes.text: We were roommates for a second.
jokes.punchline: Minimizing what was probably a brief, failed roommate situation
jokes.explanation: Great understatement suggesting there's more to this story

jokes.text: paparazzi all up in our face
jokes.punchline: Ilana imagining they're celebrities being pursued
jokes.explanation: Classic Ilana delusion - turning ordinary moments into fantasy

jokes.text: Move, honk, honk. Pardon me. Out of the way, clavicle. Okay, five-nine, I can't even, like, deal with you right now.
jokes.setup: Abbi trying to get to the bar
jokes.punchline: Increasingly aggressive and specific insults to people in her way
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation from polite to absurd - 'clavicle' and 'five-nine' as insults

jokes.text: The West Nile Coolatta is very popular, but I would recommend 'The sex trafficking on the beach' or 'The tsunami slide.'
jokes.setup: Asking about drinks at charity event
jokes.punchline: Cocktails named after global tragedies and crimes
jokes.explanation: Exceptionally dark and original - naming drinks after human suffering at charity event

jokes.text: Well, 6% of the proceeds go to the tsunami. What tsunami? Whichever one happens next.
jokes.punchline: Preparing for future disasters instead of helping current ones
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark logic - preemptive disaster capitalism

jokes.text: Just now a child in South America died of starvation. Would you like another?
jokes.punchline: Immediately following with starvation fact
jokes.explanation: Perfect dark juxtaposition between excess and suffering

jokes.text: Hold on, do you just have one fact that you repeat? Well, you're the first people to actually want a second.
jokes.punchline: Most people stop eating after hearing about starvation
jokes.explanation: Great meta moment - calling out the repetitive nature while explaining it

jokes.text: This is the men's room. Adoy!
jokes.setup: Abbi entering what she thinks is bathroom
jokes.punchline: Wrong bathroom, delivered with made-up exclamation
jokes.explanation: 'Adoy' is a funny nonsense exclamation, shows Abbi's awkwardness

jokes.text: Well, well, well. What do we have here?
jokes.setup: Abbi presumably finding drugs in bathroom
jokes.punchline: Cliché detective line delivered in drug discovery context
jokes.explanation: Cliché line but fits Abbi's attempt to be edgy and worldly

jokes.text: This church bell techno song still has 27 minutes left.
jokes.punchline: Specific description of terrible pretentious music
jokes.explanation: 'Church bell techno' perfectly captures pretentious electronic music

jokes.text: We've been asked to play whale songs, so that's probably not gonna happen.
jokes.punchline: Even more bizarre music planned
jokes.explanation: Escalates the absurdity - whale songs at a party

jokes.text: I like that 'I Dream of Jeannie' hair. Thanks. You grant wishes?
jokes.punchline: Logical follow-up question based on comparison
jokes.explanation: Good flirty logic - if you look like Jeannie, do you grant wishes?

jokes.text: I've cleaned more pubes than you have on your entire body. I look at you for a second, I can tell you got no pubes.
jokes.punchline: Weirdly specific and inappropriate insult about body hair
jokes.explanation: Brilliant callback - using her degrading job as source of authority

jokes.text: You got a friend? Who's a female? Yeah, chocolate brown eyes, ass of an angel.
jokes.setup: Guy surprised Ilana has female friends
jokes.punchline: Ilana's graphic description of Abbi
jokes.explanation: Shows Ilana's inappropriate oversharing about her best friend

jokes.text: What kind of lotion do you use? You know, like, normal stuff. Yeah, like Occitane?
jokes.punchline: Expensive brand assumed to be 'normal'
jokes.explanation: Good class divide joke - expensive products as baseline normal

jokes.text: Nice backpack.
jokes.punchline: Commenting on presumably inappropriate item in adult setting
jokes.explanation: Mild awkwardness - grown woman with backpack in romantic context

jokes.text: That's my grandfather's sweater. He's dead and this is the last thing of his I have. Sometimes I sleep in it
jokes.punchline: Extremely personal tragic backstory delivered inappropriately
jokes.explanation: Classic oversharing in hookup context - way too much emotional baggage

jokes.text: I cried so hard I thought I didn't have any more tears left in me. He was like my best friend, you know? And my worst enemy.
jokes.punchline: Contradictory relationship description
jokes.explanation: Continues oversharing with confusing emotional complexity

jokes.text: I'm, like, so hard right now. Ew, you're hard?
jokes.punchline: Using masculine terminology inappropriately
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - Abbi's awkward sexual expression

jokes.text: I know you don't like the word 'horny.' No, I don't like the word 'horny,' but I'm not a big fan of 'hard,' either, for a lady.
jokes.punchline: Ilana's specific linguistic preferences for female arousal
jokes.explanation: Great linguistic comedy about gendered sexual language

jokes.text: I eat sour straws like every day.
jokes.punchline: Explaining taste with childish candy habit
jokes.explanation: Mildly funny deflation - grown man admitting to daily candy consumption

jokes.text: Shower's all set, you ready to go? I love smelly girls.
jokes.punchline: Creepy admission about preferring unwashed women
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment - inappropriate sexual preference revealed

jokes.text: This is just a hilarious coincidence.
jokes.punchline: Claiming it's coincidental
jokes.explanation: Obvious lie delivered with fake innocence

jokes.text: you made us walk up eight flights of stairs, you sick weirdos.
jokes.setup: Discovering elevator after walking up stairs
jokes.punchline: Additional layer of deception by the DJs
jokes.explanation: Good escalation - they were manipulative in multiple ways

jokes.text: You know what, though? Three out of 12 is still a respectable number. I'm happy with it.
jokes.punchline: Treating it like a sports statistic with low standards
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ilana optimism - finding success in obvious failure

jokes.text: Thanks a lot, Halliburton. What does Halliburton have to do with your work? I... I don't know.
jokes.punchline: Admitting she has no idea why
jokes.explanation: Great character moment - Abbi's unfocused political anger

jokes.text: I mean an orgy in a non-sexual way. Just for, like, the Arc de Triomphe, that's it.
jokes.setup: Admitting they wouldn't have done group sex
jokes.punchline: Claiming orgy could be non-sexual
jokes.explanation: Brilliant contradiction - trying to intellectualize orgy participation

jokes.text: It's when two dudes go down on us, this is how I picture it. And they're butt to butt and then you and I do Oprah hands.
jokes.punchline: Extremely specific and ridiculous visual description
jokes.explanation: Exceptional visual comedy - 'Oprah hands' in sexual context is inspired absurdity

jokes.text: Exactly, it's like a feminism thing. Yeah, yeah, yeah. I'm being sarcastic.
jokes.setup: Ilana trying to justify the sexual scenario
jokes.punchline: Abbi calling out the obvious sarcasm
jokes.explanation: Good meta moment - Abbi being the voice of reason about Ilana's nonsense
